page.title: Template:A genealogical tree based on the Kojiki

revision.comment: Bot: create automatic enwiki redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:A genealogical tree based on the Kojiki]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:A genealogical tree based on the Kojiki]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Bot: sync with enwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:qq]]"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23124421395|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: tag page without wikidata link [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=A_genealogical_tree_based_on_the_Kojiki here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=A_genealogical_tree_based_on_the_Kojiki for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{chart top|template_name=A genealogical tree based on the Kojiki|{{{title|A genealogical tree based on the ''[[Kojiki]]''}}}}}
{{Family tree/start}}
{{Familytree| | | |01|~|y|~|02|~|~|y|~|~|03|01=[[Himetataraisuzu-hime]]|02=[[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]]|03=[[:en:Ahiratsu-hime|Ahiratsu-hime]]}}
{{Familytree| |,|-|-|-|v|-|^|-|.|||||)|-|-|.|}}
{{Familytree|01| |Hi| |02| | |03| |Ki|01='''[[Kamuyaimimi]]'''|02=[[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]]|03=[[:en:Tagishimimi|Tagishimimi]]|Hi=[[Hikoyai]]‡|Ki=[[Kisumimi]]}}
{{Family tree/end}}
‡ not in the ''[[Nihon Shoki]]''

{{chart bottom}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Mythology templates]]
[[Category:Japanese family tree templates]]

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Pages without wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

{{chart top|template_name=A genealogical tree based on the Kojiki|{{{title|A genealogical tree based on the ''[[Kojiki]]''}}}}}
{{Family tree/start}}
{{Familytree| | | |01|~|y|~|02|~|~|y|~|~|03|01=[[Himetataraisuzu-hime]]|02=[[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]]|03=[[:en:Ahiratsu-hime|Ahiratsu-hime]]}}
{{Familytree| |,|-|-|-|v|-|^|-|.|||||)|-|-|.|}}
{{Familytree|01| |Hi| |02| | |03| |Ki|01='''[[Kamuyaimimi]]'''|02=[[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]]|03=[[:en:Tagishimimi|Tagishimimi]]|Hi=[[Hikoyai]]‡|Ki=[[Kisumimi]]}}
{{Family tree/end}}
‡ not in the ''[[Nihon Shoki]]''
